message: title must be longer than or equal to 3 characters

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of tasks with optional filtering and sorting. Supports filtering by status, priority, and search term.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search in task title and description

get.description: Returns statistics about tasks including counts by status and priority
Returns task only if user is the owner or an admin

200.description: Task found and user has permission to access it

401.description: Unauthorized - JWT token missing or invalid

403.description: Access denied - user is not the task owner or admin

get.summary: Get task by ID (v2 - with permission checks)

patch.description: Updates an existing task. Only the task owner can update their tasks.

example.message: You do not have permission to access task: cmixpvpir0001p9yp5xq8r7ks

delete.description: Soft deletes a task. The task will be marked as deleted but retained in the database.

example.message: You do not have permission to access task: cmixpvpir0001p9yp5xq8r7ks

delete.description: Hard deletes a task from the database. Requires ADMIN role.

get.description: Returns the task with the soonest due date that has not passed yet. Only includes tasks with status TODO or IN_PROGRESS (excludes COMPLETED and CANCELLED). Returns null if no upcoming active tasks exist.

200.description: Next due task found (or null if none)

401.description: Unauthorized - JWT token missing or invalid

get.summary: Get task with nearest upcoming due date
